b'3.14 != 3.14:' False

b'3.14 < 2.71:' False

b'3.14 <= 3.14:' True
b'3.14 <= 2.71:' False

b'2.71 > 3.14:' False
b'3.14 >= 2.71:' True
b'3.14 >= 3.14:' True
b'2.71 >= 3.14:' False

b'0.0001 < 0.0002:' True
b'2.5 in [1.0, 5.0]:' True
b'0.5 in [1.0, 5.0]:' False
